Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Amended Unlawful Detainer Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for continued Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Murlene Randle; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Recorded by For the Record (10:26am-10:32am) (514)
Darryl Yorkey, Esq., appearing in person for Plaintiff Ronald Y. Wu Co-Trustee of the Wu Family Trust DBA Grant Pine Enterprise.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s).
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Monetary relief in the amount of $269,676.97, comprised of the following:
a. Past due rent in the amount of $99,615.39;
b. Late Charges in the amount of $9,961.53;
c. Unlawful detainer damages in the total amount of $149,653.80;
d. Costs of suit in the amount of $1,169.00;
e. Additional service fees relating to court filings and service of process in the amount of $757.25; and
f. Attorneys' fees in the amount of $16,720.00
g. Less the security deposit paid by Defendant in the amount of $8,200.00.
Counsel to submit revised Judgment via email.

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Amended Unlawful Detainer Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Continued To Apr-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Elaine G. Zhu, dba Fashion Bags & Gifts.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:28 a.m.

Darryl Yorkey, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ronald Y. Wo, Co-Trustee of the Wu Family Trust, dba Grant Pine Enterprise, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Yorkey and Wu appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Elaine G. Zhu, dba Fashion Bags & Gifts.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed August 10, 2020.
Order authorizing service of Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents by Posting & Mailing was filed November 16, 2020.
Default as to defefndant Elaine G. Zhu, dba Fashion Bags & Gifts was entered on December 11, 2020.
Clerk's Judgment for Possession Only of the premises located at 501 Grant Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94108, entered on December 11, 2020.
Memo of Costs filed August 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 9, 2021.

Plaintiff Ronald Y. Wo, Co-Trustee of the Wu Family Trust, dba Grant Pine Enterprise, submits the following exhibits for the Cout's review:

Exhibit 1: Commerical/Retail Lease Agreement for subject premises.....................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Copy of plaintiff's Memorandum of Costs filed 08/25/2021...................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ronald Y. Wo, Co-Trustee of the Wu Family Trust, dba Grant Pine Enterprise, and against the defaulted defendant Elaine G. Zhu, dba Fashion Bags & Gifts, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $99,615.39.
Holdover Damages - $149,653.80.
Late Charges - $9,961.53.
Attorney Fees - TBD.
Costs - $1,926.25.

Subtotal - $261,156.97.

Minus Security Deposit of $8,200.00.

Total - $252,956.97.

Matter is CONTINUED to April 28, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for hearing on the sole issue of plaintiff's requested attorney fees. Plaintiff's appearance is waived at the next calling of the case.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:46 a.m.
